entities.description: agent based planning is a stage in the bookrag process that involves classification and planning for queries
bookrag is a system that performs classification and planning stages to handle queries
classification   plan is the specific stage within agent based planning aimed at distinguishing query types
transformer is a model architecture mentioned as an example in a query regarding long range dependencies
rnns are model architectures mentioned as an example in a query regarding long range dependencies
bookindex is a predefined set of operators used to generate plans for retrieval and generation strategies
query classification is a step within the classification   plan stage that categorizes queries
an operators plan is generated to guide retrieval and generation strategies
retrieval is a strategy guided by the operators plan
generation is a strategy guided by the operators plan

relations.description: bookrag performs the agent based planning stage as its first step
agent based planning includes the classification   plan stage to distinguish query types
the classification   plan stage uses a query comparing transformer and rnns as an example
the classification   plan stage uses a query comparing transformer and rnns as an example
agent based planning uses a predefined set of operators designed for the bookindex to generate plans
classification   plan performs query classification to distinguish query types
the operators plan is generated based on the results of query classification
the operators plan guides the retrieval strategy
the operators plan guides the generation strategy
the operators plan is designed for the bookindex
